info.name: Apex Resto Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for Apex POS + Ecommerce Backend.

## Authentication
Uses Laravel Passport (OAuth2 Bearer tokens).

## Setup
1. Set `base_url` variable (e.g. `http://localhost`)
2. Call a Login endpoint — the token is auto-saved to `api_token`
3. All protected endpoints use the saved token automatically

## API Groups
- **POS API** — Point of Sale terminal operations
- **Mobile API** — Dashboard mobile app (Flutter)
- **Customer API** — E-commerce customer-facing
- **Desktop API** — Price checker / attendance kiosk
- **Analytics** — Business intelligence endpoints
- **Reports** — Scheduled report management

request.description:
Bill every unsettled, non-voided line onto one Sale (after a split bill this pays whatever remains).

Single-tender: send payment_type (1 cash, 2 e-wallet, 4 bank transfer, 6 card, 7 gift cert) + cash (tendered, for change). Multi-tender: send payments[] with 2+ tenders instead of payment_type — credit (3) and cheque (5) are excluded; tenders must cover the total and non-cash tenders can't exceed it.

Declaring pax + sc_count/pwd_count computes the RMC 38-2012 SC/PWD group discount server-side for this receipt (VAT-exempt share + 20% off); special_discount_name/id/tin record the beneficiary for the BIR discount book. Omit them for no discount. 422 on domain errors.

Bill a chosen subset of the order's lines onto its own Sale / official receipt, leaving the rest open. The order completes and the table frees only once every non-voided line is settled. Accepts the same payment fields as Settle (payments[] multi-tender, pax/sc_count/pwd_count group discount). Already-settled or voided lines 422.

Bill every unsettled, non-voided line for the given seat(s) onto one Sale. Accepts the same payment fields as Settle. Declaring pax: 1, sc_count: 1 gives a senior's own seat its exact discount. No billable lines for the seat(s) 422.
Reassign a line to a diner/seat before it is settled (null clears it). Settled lines are locked; 422.
